name: who
description: List all agents on your channel.

name: signal_done
description: Hand off to another agent. Call 'who' first to see available agents.

next.description: Agent name to hand off to (call 'who' to see names)

request.description: What you need the next agent to do

name: send_message
description: Send a message to another agent without handing off.

to.description: Agent name to message (call 'who' to see names)
